PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Continued To Nov-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Amichai, appearing via Zoom for Petitioner Sheryl Corke.

Mr. Amichai informs the court that Percy Corke's death certificate has been located and can be filed with the court forthwith. The court continues the Petition for Letters of Aministration to November 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. so that Petitioner can file the death certificate.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Continued To Nov-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Amichai appeared by zoom for Sheryl Corke.

Mr. Amichai stated that he believes they have addressed all of the issues that were raised in the probate examiner's notes, but the thing that is missing is proof of appointment of an administrator for Percy Corke's estate, that they finally located the original will of Percy Corke and that he will file it with the court. Mr. Amachai also stated that to his knowledge, said will was never probated, that the delay is comminicating with the proposed administrator, and that they sent out waivers of bond, but they have not received them back. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to September 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If everything has not been addressed at that time, the court will take this petition off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
